results.rendered_html:
jaḍatā (von jaḍa) f.
1〉 Starrheit, Regungslosigkeit, Empfindungslosigkeit, Apathie  SUŚR. 2,266,20 .  RAGH. 9,46 .  SĀH. D. 63,14 . 169 . apratipattirjaḍatā syādiṣṭāniṣṭadarśanaśrutibhiḥ . animiṣanayananirīkṣaṇatūṣṇīṃbhāvādayastatra .. 175 . = virahaduḥkhena jīvanamātrasthitiḥ  RASAM. _im_ ŚKDR. 
— 2〉 Stumpfheit, Geistesschwäche: kena te jaḍatā pūrvamidānīṃ ca prabuddhatā  MĀRK. P. 10,33 . 13 .

results.rendered_html:
jaḍatā, -tvaṃ
1 Dulness, aversion to work, slothfulness.
2 Ignorance, stupidity;  Pt. 1. 
3 (In Rhet.) Dulness, regarded as one of the 33 subordinate feelings;  S. D. 175. 
4 Stupefaction, numbness, stupor;  U. 3. 12. 
5 Dulness, timidity;  Māl. 6. 15.
